summary: Remastered audience tape delivers crystal‑clear sound of a stellar long‑form 1974 Dead show.
review: Both reviewers rave about this version, calling it far superior to other AUD copies and praising the remastering work that brings out clarity in an otherwise legendary 73/74 era performance. The recording is praised as epic and the show itself is described as stellar, even though no specific songs are called out.

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviews give 5‑star ratings and express strong enthusiasm; limited detail lowers confidence but the unanimous praise suggests an excellent show with a high‑quality remastered audience recording.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Remastered from audience source; reviewers note it is far superior to other AUD copies, implying clearer, less muddy sound and improved overall fidelity.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Long ’73/74‑style set praised as stellar; no specific criticisms mentioned.
